definition: A 4-byte version field in the OpenType post table must equal the exact 32-bit constant 0x00020000 (big-endian bytes 00 02 00 00), with downstream gating on a numeric range check (glyph index vs. glyphNameIndex length); I2S substitutes the exact constant from the CmpLogObserver operand into the version offset while VP's CMP_MAP Hamming-distance gradient preserves near-miss version inputs as corpus stepping stones, both being jointly necessary because the all-or-nothing single-field equality gives VP no usable gradient without I2S to seed the constant, and I2S alone cannot ratchet the downstream integer bound.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the version != 0x00020000 CMP from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the exact 4-byte constant 0x00020000 at the version offset, turning the all-or-nothing equality that value_profile's gradient cannot resolve.
signature.one_line: I2S substitutes exact 32-bit post-table version constant 0x00020000

analysis.summary_one_line: Input must carry the 4-byte post-table version field equal to 0x00020000 to take the false branch and parse the v2 tail.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte post-table version field must equal the exact 32-bit constant 0x00020000 (bytes 00 02 00 00) at the version offset, so the equality test version != 0x00020000 fails and the function continues into v2 parsing instead of returning.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries the version bytes (00 02 00 00 at offset 0x17-0x1a window: 18 00 02 00 00), and the winner resolves 10/10 with hitcount 39 on the branch; the I2S stage in value_profile_cmplog substitutes the logged comparison operand 0x00020000 into the input.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile loser seeds do not place 0x00020000 at the version field (byte-diff offsets 0x17/0x19 show W=18/02 vs scattered L bytes), so version != 0x00020000 stays true and it blocks 10/10.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which reads the CmpLogObserver entry for the version != 0x00020000 comparison and substitutes the constant operand 0x00020000 directly into the input; plain value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and only gets a coarse CMP_MAP distance bucket, which gives no gradient on an all-or-nothing 4-byte equality.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocking branch is the equality test version != 0x00020000.
The blocked side is the false branch (continue into v2 parsing).
Pair 1 is value_profile_cmplog beating value_profile with an I2S delta.
Winner resolves 10/10 with branch hitcount 39 on pair 1.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=39  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: Winner-resolving seeds carry the version bytes 00 02 00 00 after the table_length field.
The W-side byte at offset 0x19 is concentrated as 02 while loser bytes are scattered.
evidence_trail.cited_section: BYTE DIFF (W vs L at common offsets)

evidence_trail.claim: After resolving, the winner enters the v2 tail and parses glyphNameIndex via table->v2X.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of edge counters and the CMP buffer.
I2SRandReplace substitutes a logged CMP operand into the input at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator.
Pair 2 is value_profile_cmplog beating cmplog with a value_profile delta.
On pair 2 the winner resolves 10/10 (hitcount 39) while cmplog resolves only 2/10 (hitcount 3).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=39  loser=3

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile/vpc CMP_MAP feedback preserves inputs whose operand pair is closer to matching as new corpus.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog's instrumentation includes the CMP_MAP gradient buckets that cmplog lacks.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: per-execution CMP buffer (`CmpLogObserver`), and CMP_MAP gradient buckets.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic 4-byte exact-equality magic gate where cmplog (I2S, no CMP_MAP) resolves as fast as value_profile_cmplog, showing the version constant is reachable by I2S substitution alone without any CMP_MAP gradient contribution.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The pair-2 attribution to CMP_MAP gradient is the weakest claim: an all-or-nothing 4-byte equality gives a coarse distance signal, so vpc's pair-2 edge over cmplog may partly reflect run-to-run variance rather than a clean gradient stepping-stone effect.

signature.mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback rewards inputs whose version operand is Hamming-closer to 0x00020000, preserving near-miss corpus stepping stones that cmplog discards and accelerating convergence to the constant.
signature.one_line: CMP_MAP gradient steps version field toward 0x00020000 through near-misses

analysis.summary_one_line: Input must carry the 4-byte post-table version field equal to 0x00020000 to take the false branch and parse the v2 tail.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same 4-byte version field must reach 0x00020000; here the discriminating capability is the CMP_MAP closeness gradient that preserves intermediate inputs whose version operand is progressively nearer to the constant.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog resolves 10/10 (hitcount 39) versus cmplog's 2/10 (hitcount 3); the winner's extra CMP_MAP gradient bucket signal preserves near-miss version inputs as corpus, accelerating convergence to the exact 0x00020000 magic.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog has I2SRandReplace but no CMP_MAP gradient feedback, so it only resolves 2/10 and blocks 8/10 with avg duration 19.80h, lacking the closeness-bucket signal that rewards inputs approaching the constant.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog's CMP_MAP gradient feedback (Hamming-distance buckets on the integer compare) gives new coverage credit to inputs whose version operand is closer to 0x00020000, retaining stepping-stones cmplog discards; this distance-bucket feedback is the technique cmplog lacks.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic 4-byte exact-equality magic gate where cmplog (I2S, no CMP_MAP) resolves as fast as value_profile_cmplog, showing the version constant is reachable by I2S substitution alone without any CMP_MAP gradient contribution.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The pair-2 attribution to CMP_MAP gradient is the weakest claim: an all-or-nothing 4-byte equality gives a coarse distance signal, so vpc's pair-2 edge over cmplog may partly reflect run-to-run variance rather than a clean gradient stepping-stone effect.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the version==0x00020000 CMP from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the exact constant 0x00020000 at offset 0x18-0x1b, which value_profile (no I2SRandReplace) cannot do.
signature.one_line: I2S copies exact 0x00020000 version constant into post-table field

analysis.summary_one_line: The post sub-table version field at offset 0x18 must equal the 32-bit constant 0x00020000 to take the true branch.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A 4-byte field at offset 0x18 holding the big-endian value 00 02 00 00 (0x00020000), the post-table version 2.0, matched exactly by the gate at line 223.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds carry the bytes 00 02 00 00 at offsets 0x18-0x1b; the byte-diff shows offset 0x18 W=00x5, 0x19 W=02x5, 0x1a W=00x5, 0x1b W=00x5, exactly the 0x00020000 the version==0x00020000 gate requires.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so it cannot copy the intercepted 0x00020000 CMP operand into the input; its loser-blocking seeds carry arbitrary bytes at offset 0x18 (e.g. 0x1b loser=47(G)x8) and never satisfy the version-2.0 gate, blocking on the false side.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the per-execution CmpLogObserver buffer for the version==0x00020000 comparison and substitutes the recorded constant 0x00020000 at the matching input offset, which value_profile (no I2SRandReplace) cannot do.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocking branch is a 32-bit exact-equality test against the constant 0x00020000.
The winner-resolving seeds carry 00 02 00 00 at offset 0x18.
At offset 0x19 the winner concentrates on 02 while it differs from the loser distribution.
At offset 0x1b the winner is 00 while the loser concentrates on 0x47.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator.
I2SRandReplace substitutes a recorded CMP operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=10/10  blocked=0  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=0/10  blocked=10  unreached=0

evidence_trail.claim: Bare cmplog buffers operands per execution and is consumed by the mutator, not by feedback (no CMP_MAP gradient).
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
The CMP buffer is
consumed by the mutator, not by feedback.

evidence_trail.claim: The vpc>cmplog pair resolves the winner 10/10 versus the cmplog loser 2/10.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=10/10  blocked=0  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=2/10  blocked=8  unreached=0

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on version==0x00020000 in which value_profile (no I2SRandReplace) reaches the true branch as often as value_profile_cmplog, showing the 32-bit constant match does not require I2S substitution.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: Pair 2's value_profile attribution rests on the CMP_MAP gradient narrative; the byte diff alone cannot distinguish a gradient hill-climb from a lucky single-step match, since both pairs converge on the same 0x00020000 bytes.

signature.mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP records (PC, operand-distance bucket) for the version==0x00020000 comparison; an input closer to the constant adds a new bucket and is kept as corpus, giving the vpc winner a gradient toward the constant that bare cmplog lacks.
signature.one_line: CMP_MAP bucket gradient climbs version field toward 0x00020000

analysis.summary_one_line: The post sub-table version field at offset 0x18 must equal the 32-bit constant 0x00020000 to take the true branch.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same 4-byte version field at offset 0x18 must reach the 32-bit constant 0x00020000 checked by the line-223 gate.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile_cmplog's CMP_MAP gradient preserves intermediate inputs whose version field is progressively closer (smaller Hamming distance) to 0x00020000, and the winner resolves 10/10 with hitcount 39 on the branch versus cmplog's 2/10 and hitcount 3.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog alone has no CMP_MAP gradient feedback, so partial-match version values are not retained as corpus and the search lacks the distance-bucket hill-climb; cmplog blocks 8/10 with avg duration 19.80h on this branch.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records a (PC, operand-distance bucket) for the version==0x00020000 comparison; an input closer to 0x00020000 adds a new bucket and is preserved as corpus, giving the vpc winner a gradient toward the constant that bare cmplog lacks.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: Pair 2's value_profile attribution rests on the CMP_MAP gradient narrative; the byte diff alone cannot distinguish a gradient hill-climb from a lucky single-step match, since both pairs converge on the same 0x00020000 bytes.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the version-vs-0x00020000 CMP and substitutes the literal constant into the version offset, satisfying the first clause of the OR gate; value_profile lacks this mutator.
signature.one_line: I2S plants 0x00020000 version magic to clear first OR clause

analysis.summary_one_line: A post table whose version field equals exactly 0x00020000 with an in-bounds glyph index, so both clauses of the OR are false.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte post-table version field must equal the exact magic 0x00020000; the winner seeds carry version 0x0002 (bytes 00 02) where the loser seeds carry other values.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed begins with the post-table header and shows the byte run 00 02 00 00 at the version offset (0x18 region: '00 02 00 00 00 0a'), so version != 0x00020000 is false and the OR short-circuit does not fire.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile seeds carry no I2S substitution stage, so they never copy the intercepted 0x00020000 comparison operand into the version offset; their byte sets at 0x18 are dominated by 00 and unrelated values, leaving version != 0x00020000 true.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace intercepts the version-vs-0x00020000 CMP, finds the input bytes matching one operand, and substitutes the literal 0x00020000 into the input; value_profile lacks this mutator (I2S delta).

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an OR whose false side requires version == 0x00020000 and glyph in bounds.
Pair 1 vpc>value_profile is decisive with the I2S technique delta.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the post-table version 0x0002 at the version-field offset.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace substitutes one CMP operand into the input at matching offsets.

CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=55089  loser=1820

evidence_trail.claim: Resolving the false branch proceeds into the array-indexing body lines 258-272 marked winner-only.
Winner resolves 10/10 while cmplog resolves only 2/10.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on version==0x00020000 where value_profile (no I2S) resolves the branch as often as value_profile_cmplog, showing the exact-magic substitution is not what value_profile lacks.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The value_profile delta for the in-bounds glyph index (Pair 2) is inferred from hitcount/resolve gaps and CMP_MAP semantics; no seed-byte offset directly pins the glyph-index bound being closed by gradient feedback.

signature.mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP records (PC, operand-distance bucket) for the glyph-vs-len bound comparison, preserving inputs that incrementally close the gap; cmplog lacks this gradient so it cannot ratchet glyph count into range.
signature.one_line: CMP_MAP gradient narrows glyph-index vs glyphNameIndex bound

analysis.summary_one_line: A post table whose version field equals exactly 0x00020000 with an in-bounds glyph index, so both clauses of the OR are false.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Beyond matching the version magic, the glyph index must be brought in bounds (glyph < glyphNameIndex->len), which requires the CMP_MAP gradient feedback to preserve near-matching length/index comparisons.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winner hits the false side 55089 times and proceeds into the array-indexing body (lines 258-272 marked [W]), indicating the glyph-vs-len bound was satisfied repeatedly under the combined CMP_MAP gradient signal.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog resolves only 2/10 with avg hitcount 1820 versus the winner's 55089; without value_profile's CMP_MAP bucket feedback it cannot retain inputs that incrementally close the glyph>=glyphNameIndex->len bound comparison.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records (PC, operand-distance bucket) so an input closer to matching the bound is preserved as corpus; cmplog lacks this gradient feedback (value_profile delta).

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an OR whose false side requires version == 0x00020000 and glyph in bounds.
